cited_facts.why_it_matters: Explicitly states the amendment status is 'obsolete/removed: OBSOLETE', which triggers the REJECT rule for retired/obsolete proposals.
Confirms the amendment has been replaced by NonFungibleTokensV1_1 and contains known issues causing tecINVARIANT_FAILED errors, reinforcing its obsolete and unsafe status.

output_json.decision_summary: The packet explicitly identifies NonFungibleTokensV1 as obsolete and replaced by a subsequent amendment (NonFungibleTokensV1_1). It also notes critical invariant failures. Per the task rule, REJECT is required for retired/obsolete proposals or critical unsafe evidence.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: The amendment is safe to proceed with despite being obsolete.

validator_work_item.recommended_validator_action: Reject the amendment as it is obsolete and replaced.
validator_work_item.title: Reject Obsolete Amendment NonFungibleTokensV1
